x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: The customer portal is the primary channel for Now Assist CSM AI Search and VA. Without it Now Assist cannot reach customers.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure and activate a Customer Service Portal via sp_portal_list.do. Enable AI Search and VA on the portal. Test customer-facing Now Assist AI features end-to-end.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8603a33acfd903108935fb251d851c8e
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[The customer portal is the primary channel for Now Assist CSM AI Search and VA. Without it Now Assist cannot reach customers.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>CSM Customer Portal Configuration</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Check for any active Service Portal — CSM portal naming varies by org
    // Now Assist CSM AI Search and VA require an active portal to reach customers
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sp_portal');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active Service Portal(s) configured';

    if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active portal(s) configured. Now Assist CSM AI Search and VA can be delivered to customers via the portal.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active customer portals configured. Now Assist CSM AI Search and VA cannot reach customers without an active Service Portal.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>CSM</module>
<number>CHK0006045</number>
<order>80</order>
<remediation_guidance>Configure and activate a Customer Service Portal via sp_portal_list.do. Enable AI Search and VA on the portal. Test customer-facing Now Assist AI features end-to-end.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>8603a33acfd903108935fb251d851c8e</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
